reviews.review_title: You're gonna need a bigger boat...
reviews.review_description:
This game is fun just for the underwater exploration alone, but then they added harpoon fishing and the occasional shark attack to ramp up the thrills. This game is still being developed and has a way to go, but for now and at this price, you can't miss out.  

I am looking forward to what they can add to make this game even better.  Maybe more locations, more styles of fish, a better, more realist graphics. Maybe a fishing net sack on your back to put the fish into so they are not in your way or in your vision while still fishing. How about adding upgrades to your fishing tools, air tanks and equipment etc...
This game was really good when i first got it but the game never gets updates so its just boring at this point

Bro this game is fun but so scary I can't go to the nighttime mode but I can work on it in till I am not scared of nighttime mode so good and I fell in love with this game bro!!!!!!!! Good job on it add updates and add the buleca and the meldon

I love this game it's fun and exciting very immersive need more fish need more sea life like giant squids octopuses electric eels crabs lobsters hammerhead sharks swordfish what else and more different other fishes to catch more levels too more horror please add more maps and levels this game is fun The more you do in the game the better it is just gave me creepy when the sharks are coming you trying to get away and when you going to cave it they'll be creatures in a cave that glows in the dark you know the creatures that be laying the death in the deep dark without come up and it's spooky
I think it would be awsome if they added multiplayer to this game to go deep diving with all of your friends!
I like this game but it gets kinda boring so please add new fish also add multiplayer daybreak pls

Love the game!

Ideas cus why not?:

* deeper down you go, you have a rare occurrence on seeing, basking sharks, whales, and other creepy sea creatures

* upgradable swimming gear: louder but faster. Swimming with the hands is faster than usual. More oxygen in the tank, of course, it costs in-game money 

* You can choose to fish on the island with a bow and arrow, it cost less, however 

* Instead of spawning in the water, you are still on the ship, but the time of day just changes, then you dive into the water

I'm a fan of diving games in vr, and this kinda feels like treasures of the deep on PS1, love the hunting aspect. Graphics look nice on quest 3, and everything runs smoothly. Only critism is the bolt from the sling shot disappears if you shoot it out of the water by mistake, though I reckon that will be sorted in an update. For the price, you really can't go wrong

Yes, like I’ve seen in some other reviews it would really be fun to go deeper and see more cool creatures! Island fishing would be super fun to just relax when you’re stressed! Other than some other stuff we need like Gear upgrades, and new areas, This is one of my favorite games and the swimming mechanics are perfect. Have a great day and keep up the good work! 🌊🦈🦑🐳

This is a fun game but you should add a gun so if a shark is coming at you when you have a fish on your harpoon you can shoot it to make it go away but this has good graphics and I was the best purchase I ever made.

This game is really awesome… there is one thing I’d love to be added though. The ability to turn off the radio and commentator and to walk/teleport to the back of the boat, the water surface/island graphics are that good but unfortunately can’t enjoy them as I would like from in the cabin…. It’s an app that would be my daily go to for the atmosphere on the surface… transporting to the island would be even better but I figured that’s too much to ask…

It’s fun for like 10 minutes, then i had unlocked all the levels caught most the fish and had nothing else to do. I don’t know what i was expecting really, but i didn’t think it would be so easy and tame. The only reason i’m not refunding is that i respect that it’s in early development, but i just don’t think it was ready for release yet. good work on the game though.
The game is super fun when you first get it but after it starts to get boring saying that there is not any multiplayer and it just doesn’t have any fun after u get the fish and barely have any fish.￼
I know it just came out but when y’all can yall need to add a lot more fish sharks and stingrays would be cool too

This game is a fun/horror game. it’s very unique and I’ve never seen a VR game like this. I like how you get money by catching fish, the sharks are very scary, I can’t wait for multiplayer to come out thanks for the awesome game!!!!

I was hiding around the coral so that I wouldn’t see a shark or be seen by one and it’s was just so incredible, the realistic-ish art style, the cameo from Daybreak himself! I could not ask for a better game and I will be playing for weeks on end. I hope you see this review @Daybreak or his team and I hope you think to yourself everyday, ‘I made this… I accomplished something In my life that I love and that spreads the love for the game around. Im proud’ I hope you see this - Doubtful_Winner
Hope it more creatures, and bigger locations in the future

Sharkbait have positively surprised me. It's especially well made with mechanics that are so immersive. Everything in the game is done manually with the controllers with no UI, hud, etc. That makes this game exceptionally immersive - rolling the harpun after every shot, filling oxygen tanks, and checking it's level on a watch, everything in a beauty graphics.
Amazing gameplay the graphics are just amazing shark gave me a little scare

The game is super fun until you unlock all the levels 
My recommendation would be to give us random spawns so we don't get bored of having the same spawn and upgrades even if it is only oxygen and boost I want to go faster or have it to every sacrifice oxygen for more speed to still make us think about our oxygen supply

With the art style, this game really reminds me of Subnautica, except you’re just a fisher, and there’s no crashed ship. The shark attacks are genuinely scary when you least expect them. definitely one of my favorite horror games/experience.
Also heres a suggestion - add a Thalassophobia mode/ or nightmare mode where all the fish are just sharks.

Daybreak, and the devs, you did an amazing job with this game!  -YourVrTher4pist

Really good and interesting game about underwater fishing, a little bit lack of connect but I hope developers will add additional fish and tools. 
WE NEED MORE OF THIS GAME 🎮

I like the underwater swimming,  I have no motion sickness. 
The fish behavior and the surrounding sounds feel so natural. 
And yes, there is a scary part in the dark water and in the caves.
The map in the tablet helps me to get to the places I want.
Looking forward to the game upgrades.
Really fun game with good ideas. Only problem I have is the maps feel to small. It would be really cool if it was an open world game but other than that perfect
I love this game and i am sceard of the ocen and i hate the sharkes

reviews.review_title: Best swimming on the meta quest
reviews.review_description: This game has great mechanics and gorgeous environments 10/10

Truly immersive. I liked swimming around a lot just watching fish and listening to the calming music. Then a shark appeared, I was scared first but managed to catch it somehow after a long struggle. Great experience so far

This is one of the greatest games on app lab. Encountering the great white is one of the most horrifying things i have seen, but the game is super fun and WAY to addictive.
9/10
Awesome game

I’ve been watching the development since the start and it did not disappoint me. The game is a very creative idea and the first shark encounter just gives you a rush.


10/10 would recommend
Amazing game 10/10 love the swimming mechanics and it’s scary but not to scary a horror game I can finally play
This game is absolutely amazing I love that it is the perfect balance between cill and scary keep up the good work
This game is amazing good graphics, good game play and cool fish. I played this game for 1 hours straight and I still wanted to play but my headset went flat.
This game goes hard fr
This game was in beta for 14 months and I was worth the wait

reviews.review_title: Gonna need a bigger spear gun
reviews.review_description: A really nice diving and spear fishing sim...with lots of sharks and the deep!!
10/10 would try again
This game is such a fun horror experience! Mechanics are great, and the sharks are crazy!!

reviews.review_title: Reminds me of Dave the divet
reviews.review_description: I just started to play Dave the diver when I discovered this game. It is like it but in vr it’s fun and has a horror essence to it
This is the best game ever created it is fun and scary I bumped into a shark and went back to lobby 😆😆😆
Great game would recamend
